user.title: MySmartBlinds BLE
user.description: Add a MySmartBlinds motor using a Bluetooth adapter or ESPHome Bluetooth proxy. Nearby devices: {discovered}

cloud_login.title: Sign in to MySmartBlinds
cloud_login.description: Sign in with your MySmartBlinds app account to fetch encoded MAC and key data for the selected blind. Target address: {address}

cloud_select.title: Select blind from cloud account
cloud_select.description: No exact cloud match was found for {address}. Choose one of the {count} blinds returned by your account.

setup_method.title: Choose setup method
setup_method.description: Choose how to fetch the pairing key for {address}.

auto_failed.title: Auto discovery did not find a key

error.cloud_login_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your credentials or API connectivity.
error.invalid_setup_method: Choose one of the available setup methods.
error.not_supported: This Bluetooth discovery does not look like a supported MySmartBlinds device.

abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not supported by this integration.
